hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'playwright/typescript'; then ROOT=$(git -C "$(dirname "$FILE")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && cd "$ROOT/playwright/typescript" && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run format; fi; true

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git commit'; then ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 2; cd "$ROOT/playwright/typescript" || exit 2; OUT=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); TSC_EXIT=$?; if [ $TSC_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo "$OUT" >&2; exit 2; fi; OUT=$(npm run format:check 2>&1); FMT_EXIT=$?; if [ $FMT_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo "$OUT" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Verifying types and format before commit...
